clause_text: The lessee shall remit payment within thirty days of receipt of invoice.
simple_text: The renter must pay within 30 days after getting the invoice.

clause_text: Either party may terminate this agreement upon material breach after written notice and a ten-day cure period.
simple_text: Either side can end the agreement for a serious breach after written notice and 10 days to fix it.

clause_text: The provider shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages.
simple_text: The provider is not responsible for certain indirect or extra damages.
